Class MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.loadbalancer.stats.MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle
All Implemented Interfaces:
LoadBalancerLifecycle<Object, Object, ServiceInstance>
public class MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle extends Object implements LoadBalancerLifecycle<Object, Object, ServiceInstance>
An implementation of LoadBalancerLifecycle that records metrics for load-balanced calls.
Since:
3.0.0
Author:
Olga Maciaszek-Sharma, Jaroslaw Dembek

    void
    onComplete(CompletionContext<Object, ServiceInstance, Object> completionContext)
    A callback method executed after load-balancing.

    A callback method executed before load-balancing.

  • Constructor Details

    • MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle

      public MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle(io.micrometer.core.instrument.MeterRegistry meterRegistry, ReactiveLoadBalancer.Factory<ServiceInstance> loadBalancerFactory)

    • MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true) public MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle(io.micrometer.core.instrument.MeterRegistry meterRegistry)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      in favour of MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle(MeterRegistry, ReactiveLoadBalancer.Factory)
      Creates a MicrometerStatsLoadBalancerLifecycle instance based on the provided MeterRegistry.
      Parameters:
      meterRegistry - MeterRegistry to use for Micrometer metrics.

  • Method Details

    • supports

      public boolean supports(Class requestContextClass, Class responseClass, Class serverTypeClass)
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancerLifecycle
      Allows to assess whether the lifecycle bean's callbacks should be executed. Some examples of possible implementations could comprise of verifying whether the classes passed in parameters are exactly or extend the classes that this lifecycle bean should process.
      Specified by:
      supports in interface LoadBalancerLifecycle<Object, Object, ServiceInstance>
      Parameters:
      requestContextClass - The class of the Request context
      responseClass - The class of the CompletionContext clientResponse
      serverTypeClass - The type of Server that the LoadBalancer retrieves
      Returns:
      true if the lifecycle should be used to process given classes

    • onStart

      public void onStart(Request<Object> request)
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancerLifecycle
      A callback method executed before load-balancing.
      Specified by:
      onStart in interface LoadBalancerLifecycle<Object, Object, ServiceInstance>
      Parameters:
      request - the Request that will be used by the LoadBalancer to select a service instance

    • onStartRequest

      public void onStartRequest(Request<Object> request, Response<ServiceInstance> lbResponse)
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancerLifecycle
      A callback method executed after a service instance has been selected, before executing the actual load-balanced request.
      Specified by:
      onStartRequest in interface LoadBalancerLifecycle<Object, Object, ServiceInstance>
      Parameters:
      request - the Request that has been used by the LoadBalancer to select a service instance
      lbResponse - the Response returned by the LoadBalancer

    • onComplete

      public void onComplete(CompletionContext<Object, ServiceInstance, Object> completionContext)
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancerLifecycle
      A callback method executed after load-balancing.
      Specified by:
      onComplete in interface LoadBalancerLifecycle<Object, Object, ServiceInstance>
      Parameters:
      completionContext - the CompletionContext containing data relevant to the load-balancing and the response returned from the selected service instance
